lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Have I seen you before?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think so... I've just got one of those faces.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: You're probably right.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: I'm rather busy at the moment. I've got to organise my cupboards of jewels.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Want any help?

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Absolutely not! You stay away from my jewels.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Interested in buying a house like mine?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not sure I've got enough coins to do that.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Silly me! I mistook you for one of us wealthy folk.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well that's rude.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: You'll catch on.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Hello there. Are you liking the city?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's beautiful!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: It really is.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Huh? Are you an encyclopedia salesman?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, sir, I'm a burglar. I burgle people.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Hmm... I think you're an encyclopedia salesman?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not at all. I just want to ransack the place. Honestly.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Hmm... Alright then.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: I love the fresh air outside, don't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is quite nice out here.

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Lovely day for a stroll, wouldn't you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: I've got something in the back of my mind telling me I should go back home.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't say...

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: I do love being rich! I can take leisurely strolls whenever I want, without a care in the world!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enjoy it! Take as much time as you want!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Time to go check how rich I am!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Lovely day for a stroll.

sections.title: If the player is still inside when Caius leaves
When Caius returns to the house

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Now where did I put my keys...

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Ah, there they are!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: It smells funny in here...

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: There's mud all over the floor!

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: Something isn't right here...

sections.title: When Caius catches you inside his house after returning

lines.speaker: Caius
lines.text: How did you get in here?
